## Checklist

- [ ] Read the sprint cheat sheet
- [ ] Worked through the interactive tool
- [ ] Completed the workbook notebook
- [ ] Submitted the challenge lab PR
- [ ] Reviewed the sprint flashcards (≥3 sessions)
- [ ] Posted a Show & Tell or asked a Q&A question
